scripts.test:backend:ci: python -m pytest tests/backend -q --cov=app.clips.range --cov=app.session_data --cov=app.bootstrap.dependency_bootstrap_ops --cov=app.vod.download_utils --cov=app.clips.split_export --cov=app.webui_app_shell --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term --cov-fail-under=67 && python -m pytest tests/backend/services/test_detector.py tests/backend/services/test_capture_frame_source.py -q
scripts.test:frontend:ci: npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend:ci && npm run test:desktop:ci && npm run check:build-security && npm run test:frontend:ci
scripts.dev: npm run sync:meta && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/ensure_venv.ps1 && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix desktop run dev
scripts.build:desktop: npm run sync:meta && npm --prefix desktop run build
scripts.build:desktop:portable: npm run sync:meta && npm --prefix desktop run build:portable
